headline: Flowserve and Bassett Furniture have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: Flowserve hits a 5-year high after upbeat 2026 guidance, while Bassett Furniture faces estimate cuts despite restructuring gains.

headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Enbridge, Kinder Morgan and Williams Companies
summary: Enbridge stands out as oil pipeline stocks ride stable cash flows, data center demand, and billions in growth projects. What's driving ENB and peers?
